description:
ICICI Lombard's Golden Shield Plan is a latest Health Insurance plan specially for the senior citizens.

ICICI Lombard Golden Shield offers various features such as - Lifetime Renewals , Reset Benefit , Care Management Program etc.
In this video, we have discussed all the features , exclusions , waiting periods & also calculated the premiums for ICICI Lombard Golden Shield Plan.

WATCH THE VIDEO FOR MORE DETAILS :)

✅  To buy insurance policies, click here - https://hareepatti.com/contact-us/
